accepted.reason: Coprime-pair counting with double nested loops is a straightforward arithmetic kernel for optimization tasks.
Gaussian and mixture accumulation loops are high-value numeric kernels with clear vectorization opportunities.
Tight random-sample generation loops provide simple performance-critical baseline kernels.
Collapsed Gibbs topic resampling is a strong probabilistic nested-loop kernel family for Cython conversion.
Multimodal topic-model sampling and likelihood evaluation add diverse probabilistic matrix/count-update patterns.
Beam-search decoding with blank/non-blank bookkeeping is a high-signal dynamic-programming style kernel.

skipped.reason: Depends on project-specific trit/byte conversion and hash-state plumbing; less portable as standalone GRPO example.
Benchmark harness around external point classes rather than self-contained compute logic.
Large IO/scipy-heavy motif pipeline with external coupling; lower standalone conversion value for this dataset.
Primarily a C++ wrapper/binding layer with manual memory management, not a direct Python kernel target.
